description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a rectangular layout. The front facade includes a large garage with a light wood door, a covered entryway supported by simple columns, and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light gray material, complemented by black window frames and a wooden accent around the main entrance. The landscaping includes a paved driveway, a walkway, and several stylized trees and shrubs, adding greenery to the urban setting. The rear of the house showcases a large glass wall and a central courtyard with a tree, providing natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing openness and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, featuring a garage and a central courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway with columns, large windows, and two tall trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with a large window and the continuation of the driveway and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a full glass wall, central courtyard with a tree, and extensive window coverage on both floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage extension, flat rooflines, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with simple columns, a wooden accent, and a flush modern door, set back from the driveway with a paved walkway.
